MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off calendar. On December 10, 2014, moving party was dismissed from the case. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
